text.title: Docker Image Optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Wheels rebuild from source; CI 3× slower.
antipattern.root-cause: Alpine chosen for Python without considering musl wheel cost.

antipattern.symptom: Every CI rebuild reinstalls all deps.
antipattern.fix: Wire BuildKit cache mounts for pip / npm / go-mod / apt.

antipattern.symptom: Production image carries node_modules dev deps + tests.

antipattern.fix: Record sizes + CI timings before and after.
